title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at ICICI Lombard

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at ICICI Lombard
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, ICICI Lombard in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Lombard:
ICICI Lombard is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Lombard!
